potassium_not_low_no_action_needed: correctly determined potassium not low but final answer format or content mismatched expected
date_filter_too_restrictive_no_results: applied a date filter that excluded all results, leading to no data found
age_returned_without_unit: returned a numeric age value without the required unit (e.g., 'years')
observation_subject_reference_missing_pr: used bare patient ID instead of 'Patient/ID' in Observation subject reference
no_hba1c_found_returned_minus_one: returned -1 when no HbA1C result was found instead of a proper not-found message
magnesium_value_returned_without_unit: returned a numeric magnesium value without the required unit
patient_not_found_incorrectly: returned 'Patient not found' when the patient actually exists in the system
magnesium_not_low_no_action_needed: correctly determined magnesium not low but final answer format or content mismatched expected
missing_final_answer_after_action: performed a POST action but did not return a FINISH with the final answer
correct_actions_but_answer_mismatch: performed correct FHIR actions but final answer text did not match expected output
